meta.project: Learning Management System (LMS) for Schools & Colleges

product_overview: A role-based Learning Management System for schools and colleges that supports academic delivery, enrollment, assignments, grading, attendance, and administrative oversight. The current backend scope exposes authentication, user management, course listing/creation, enrollments/applications, and assignment listing APIs.
core_goals: Provide secure role-based access for Admin, Teacher, and Student users
Support course discovery, course creation, and curriculum navigation
Enable student applications and enrollment tracking
Allow authenticated users to view their profile, enrollments, and assignments
Support administrative user management for institution operations

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allows users to log in and access their account profile through JWT-based authentication.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT access token and user session details -> GET /api/v1/auth/me with JWT token -> Receive 200 with current user profile
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with authentication error message

features.name: User Management
features.description: Provides admin-only visibility into the user list for institutional account administration.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/users with a valid admin JWT token -> Receive 200 with paginated list of users
GET /api/v1/users with a non-admin authenticated token -> Receive 403 Forbidden due to insufficient privileges
GET /api/v1/users without an authentication token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Courses Management
features.description: Supports course discovery for authenticated users, course creation for admins, and module browsing for specific courses.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/courses with a valid authenticated token -> Receive 200 with accessible course list -> POST /api/v1/courses with admin credentials and valid course data -> Receive 201 Created with new course details -> GET /api/v1/courses/:id/modules with valid token -> Receive 200 with module list for the selected course
POST /api/v1/courses with a non-admin token -> Receive 403 Forbidden because course creation is admin-only
GET /api/v1/courses/:id/modules with an invalid course id -> Receive 404 Not Found or equivalent course lookup error

features.name: Enrollments and Applications
features.description: Allows students to apply for courses and authenticated users to view their enrollments.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/applications with valid application data -> Receive 201 Created with application status pending review -> GET /api/v1/enrollments with authenticated token -> Receive 200 with current enrollment records
POST /api/v1/applications with missing or invalid required fields -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors
GET /api/v1/enrollments without a valid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Assignments
features.description: Exposes assignment listing for authenticated users to review academic tasks.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/assignments with a valid authenticated token -> Receive 200 with assignment list for the user scope
GET /api/v1/assignments with insufficient permissions or no available assignments -> Receive 403 Forbidden or 200 with an empty list, depending on authorization and data availability

features.name: Courses Management
features.description: CRUD for courses, modules, and lessons
